---
name: New Page
about: Propose or submit a new page for the guild world
title: '[Page] '
labels: new-page
assignees: ''
---

**Page name:**
e.g., "Guild Library", "Pet Store"

**Zone:**
Where would it fit? (Game / Guild World / Economy / Lore / Absurd Wing / Government / Vault)

**Description:**
What does the page do? What's the concept?

**i18n ready?**
- [ ] English translations included
- [ ] Traditional Chinese (繁體中文) translations included
- [ ] Thai (ภาษาไทย) translations included

**Self-contained?**
- [ ] All CSS is inline or in the HTML file
- [ ] All JS is inline or uses existing `nw-*.js` modules
- [ ] No external dependencies added
